goal: Turn Article6 into a methodology-aware verification workspace built around traceable, defensible, reviewable rule review records for VVB-style workflows.
immediate_next_action: Implement Phase 0 and Phase 1 only. Freeze the roadmap and contract now; defer product implementation to the Phase 1 workstream.
vvb_ready_criteria: At least one target method can be reviewed end-to-end.
Every verified rule has rationale, support, and provenance.
AOI and STAC facts appear where relevant and never auto-verify a rule.
Document and workbook evidence can be linked where needed.
Export is reviewable outside the app.
The system does not overclaim or fake certainty.
The workflow saves meaningful reviewer time.
non_goals: Do not market this as full automated verification.
Do not let STAC auto-verify rules.
Do not allow unsupported green checks.
Do not claim a formal certification opinion.
Do not broaden this roadmap into a general redesign or refactor.

phases.title: Roadmap + contract freeze
key_deliverables: Roadmap doc in both repos.
phase-status.json in both repos.
Shared roadmap id and phase sequence.
Explicit repo boundaries.
Explicit definition of the rule review record.
exit_criteria: No ambiguity about what gets built first.
No ambiguity about which repo owns what.

phases.title: Rule review record
key_deliverables: Real rule review panel in app.article6.
Persistence for rationale, support, and provenance in app.article6.
Full rule text and source anchors exposed cleanly by article6-methodologies.
Stable rule-review contract consumed by the app.
blockers: Phase 0 contract freeze must land first.
exit_criteria: Clicking a rule opens a real review record.
A reviewer can understand the rule and record rationale and support.
The UI shape can grow without redesign.

phases.title: Defensible verification
key_deliverables: Verified requires rationale in app.article6.
Verified requires support reference and or linked evidence in app.article6.
Reviewer identity and timestamp capture in app.article6.
Manual-review and support-type metadata where needed in article6-methodologies.
blockers: Phase 1 rule review record must exist first.
exit_criteria: Every verified rule has visible rationale and support.
A reviewer can inspect why a rule is green.
Unsupported green checks are no longer possible.

phases.title: AOI + STAC support facts
key_deliverables: Rule-level AOI and STAC support rendering in app.article6.
Scene, source, temporal, overlap, and cloud fact display in app.article6.
STAC eligibility and expected fact shapes by rule in article6-methodologies.
Explicit support-only language in the app.
blockers: Phase 2 defensible verification must land first.
exit_criteria: STAC appears only where appropriate.
STAC facts are inspectable and traceable.
STAC does not directly flip statuses.

phases.title: Document + workbook support
key_deliverables: Document and workbook upload and linking flows in app.article6.
Fragment-level evidence references in app.article6.
Expected evidence-type contracts in article6-methodologies.
Optional fact templates per rule in article6-methodologies where credible.
blockers: Phase 3 AOI and STAC support facts must land first.
exit_criteria: A reviewer can support rules with document, workbook, and report references.
Linked evidence is inspectable at source-fragment level.
Evidence is traceable, not loosely attached.

phases.title: Method completeness on target methods
key_deliverables: Full AR-ACM0003 coverage in article6-methodologies.
A second target method after AR-ACM0003 in article6-methodologies.
A method expansion playbook in article6-methodologies.
UI compatibility with richer contracts in app.article6.
blockers: Phase 4 document and workbook support must land first.
exit_criteria: One real target method can be reviewed end-to-end.
A second method proves repeatability.
Methodology expansion has a clear playbook.

phases.title: Exportable verification output
key_deliverables: PDF and JSON export generation in app.article6.
Rule-by-rule rationale, support, and provenance in exports.
Unresolved gaps remain explicit in exports.
Canonical export support fields added upstream only if needed.
blockers: Phase 5 method completeness must land first.
exit_criteria: Exported packs are understandable outside the app.
Every verified rule in export has visible support.
Unresolved rules remain explicit.

phases.title: Pilot-ready VVB workflow
key_deliverables: Workflow hardening in app.article6.
Pilot-ready demo path and reviewer instructions in app.article6.
Pricing and scope boundaries for pilot delivery.
No methodology contract drift from article6-methodologies.
blockers: Phase 6 exportable verification output must land first.
exit_criteria: One complete demo or pilot path works without hand-waving.
A VVB or project developer can understand the value quickly.
Exports and review records hold up under scrutiny.
